title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 158.58 resistance — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD Retail Sentiment
text: AUD/USD sentiment at 9% long / 91% short — extreme short bias, watch for squeeze as retail is heavily positioned.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation breaks at +0.672 — JPY no longer acting as safe haven, watch for regime shift implications.

title: VIX Level
text: VIX at 17.5 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.20%.

title: Fed-ECB Rate Differential
text: Fed 3.75% (ON HOLD) vs ECB 2.00% (ON HOLD) — 175bp spread continues to weigh on EUR/USD; rate divergence favours USD.
